overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a white-haired warrior walking through a misty, narrow canyon at dusk. The character progresses from a rocky mountain passage toward a massive wooden shipwreck, with glowing particles floating in the foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with steep cliff walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon passage between high rock walls

entered.detail: steep dark rock face forming the left boundary of the canyon
steep dark rock face forming the right boundary of the canyon
evergreen trees visible along the top edge of the canyon cliffs
small floating particles of light drifting in the foggy air throughout the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, foggy canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. Sparse pine trees line the cliff tops above, and glowing wisps float in the misty air, creating an ethereal atmosphere.

events.description: massive wooden shipwreck structure becomes visible in the distance at the end of the canyon passage

agents.ego_description: continuing through the deepening canyon as the path narrows and darkens

entered.detail: large wooden ship hull wreckage visible in the distance, tilted against the canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The canyon walls draw closer as the character proceeds deeper into the ravine. The pine trees disappear from view above the cliffs, and at approximately 35 seconds, a massive wooden shipwreck comes into view in the distance, marking the destination ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shipwreck wreckage site with massive wooden hull and support beams

events.description: character reaches the shipwreck and begins walking alongside the massive wooden structure

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the shipwreck and examining the wooden wreckage and support beams

entered.detail: thick wooden stilts and beams supporting the shipwreck hull above the ground
dense pine forest visible beyond the shipwreck at the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into the shipwreck area, walking alongside the massive wooden hull supported by wooden beams. The right canyon wall is replaced by the wreckage, and a forested background becomes visible beyond. The character explores the derelict structure as the canyon opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, misty canyon that gradually opens into a wide area dominated by a massive shipwreck. It begins with the character walking between steep rock walls under a canopy of sparse pine trees, while glowing wisps float through the ethereal fog. As the character proceeds deeper, the canyon walls tighten and the trees vanish from view, before the silhouette of a colossal wooden shipwreck emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character emerges from the ravine, with the right canyon wall giving way to the towering wooden hull and supporting beams of the wreck. Finally, the environment expands further to reveal a forested background as the character explores the derelict structure.
